featureName: Planning Modal: Fix instructions + messages + confirmation participants + account filtering
description: Fix instructions textarea not working, update messages to clarify invited-only access, exclude non-account contacts from quotes/confirmation, add slot confirmation participants selector matching creation flow, wire data through to server action.

userStories.title: Fix instructions textarea + add local state for instructions
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the instructions textarea in the planning modal to work (typing updates the value), so I can add instructions when scheduling.
acceptanceCriteria: Add modalInstructions state in parent, initialized from intervention.instructions
Pass instructions and onInstructionsChange props to ProgrammingModal
Typing in textarea updates the displayed text in real-time
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added modalInstructions state, passed instructions + onInstructionsChange to modal

userStories.title: Update modal messages for invited-only clarity
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want all messages in the planning modal to clearly state that only invited contacts (with accounts) receive notifications and have access to instructions, estimation, and planning.
acceptanceCriteria: Participants section subtitle mentions invited contacts
Instructions info notice mentions invited contacts only
Quote section mentions only invited providers
Planning section 'organize' info mentions invited participants
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Updated 4 messages: participants subtitle, instructions info, quote description, organize info

userStories.title: Add ParticipantConfirmationSelector to 'direct' and 'propose' modes in planning modal
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, when I choose 'Fixer le rendez-vous' or 'Proposer des disponibilités' in the planning modal, I want to see the same ParticipantConfirmationSelector as in the creation flow — optional toggle for fixed date, mandatory for slots — so I can choose who must validate.
acceptanceCriteria: In 'direct' (fixed date) mode: optional confirmation toggle (Switch) + ParticipantConfirmationSelector (mandatory=false) when toggled on
In 'propose' (slots) mode: mandatory ParticipantConfirmationSelector (mandatory=true) always visible
Selector shows managers (excluding current user), providers, tenants — only those with accounts
Contacts without accounts are excluded from the selector
New props: confirmationRequired, onConfirmationRequiredChange, requiresConfirmation, onRequiresConfirmationChange added to modal
New state managed in parent component
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added ParticipantConfirmationSelector + UserCheck icon, confirmationManagers/Providers/Tenants memos filter by has_account, direct mode has optional Switch toggle, propose mode has mandatory selector always visible, currentUserId passed to exclude self from managers

userStories.title: Wire confirmation data + assignmentMode + instructions through server action
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the planning hook and server action to accept and process confirmationRequired, assignmentMode, providerInstructions and instructions, so the data is correctly stored in the DB.
acceptanceCriteria: PlanningData type includes confirmationRequired field
useInterventionPlanning accepts confirmationRequired param
handleProgrammingConfirm includes confirmationRequired in payload
programInterventionAction accepts and processes confirmationRequired: updates intervention_assignments.requires_confirmation
programInterventionAction stores instructions on intervention
programInterventionAction stores assignmentMode on intervention
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Extended PlanningData with confirmationRequired+requiresConfirmation, hook passes them in payload, server action stores instructions+assignment_mode+requires_participant_confirmation on intervention, updates intervention_assignments.requires_confirmation+confirmation_status per user, also handles providerInstructions
